events.description: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. presented first retrospective case series of CRENESSITY at ENDO 2026 in Chicago
events.evidence_text: SAN DIEGO, June 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: NBIX) today announced clinical findings from the first retrospective case series in pediatric and adult patients with classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia (CAH) due to 11β‑hydroxylase deficiency. The findings were presented at the Endocrine Society's annual meeting, ENDO 2026, in Chicago.
